ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* The chromosome where the gene is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* The start position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* The end position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "strand" TEXT /* The strand of the DNA (e.g., +, -) */,
  "gene_type" TEXT /* The type of gene (e.g., protein-coding, non-coding) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* The start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The end date of the study */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* The name of the principal investigator */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* The source of funding for the study */,
  "study_status" TEXT /* The status of the study (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "study_design" TEXT /* The design of the study (e.g., case-control, cohort) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_genes" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "effect_size" REAL /* Effect size of the gene in the study */,
  "effect_size_standard_error" REAL /* Standard error of the effect size */,
  "effect_size_pval" REAL /* P-value of the effect size */,
  "effect_size_fdr" REAL /* FDR-corrected p-value of the effect size */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* The sample size of the study */,
  "population" TEXT /* The population or cohort studied */,
  "trait_or_disease" TEXT /* The trait or disease being studied */,
  "statistical_method" TEXT /* The statistical method used to analyze the data */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* The confidence interval for the effect size */,
  "annotation" TEXT /* Additional notes or annotations about the gene-study relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id", "gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tau_squared" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "tau_squared" REAL /* Tau squared value for the study */,
  "total_samples" INTEGER /* The total number of samples used in the study */,
  "tau_squared_confidence_interval" TEXT /* The confidence interval for the tau squared value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "num_studies" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "num_studies" INTEGER /* Number of studies for the gene */,
  "total_samples" INTEGER /* The total number of samples across all studies for the gene */,
  "total_effect_size" REAL /* The total effect size across all studies for the gene */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cochrane_q" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "cochrane_q" REAL /* Cochrane's Q value for the study */,
  "total_samples" INTEGER /* The total number of samples used in the study */,
  "cochrane_q_confidence_interval" TEXT /* The confidence interval for the Cochrane's Q value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "heterogeneity_pval" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "heterogeneity_pval" REAL /* P-value for heterogeneity test for the study */,
  "total_samples" INTEGER /* The total number of samples used in the study */,
  "heterogeneity_pval_confidence_interval" TEXT /* The confidence interval for the heterogeneity p-value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fisher_stats" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "fisher_stat_up" REAL /* Fisher's statistic for up regulated genes */,
  "fisher_pval_up" REAL /* P-value for Fisher's statistic for up regulated genes */,
  "fisher_fdr_up" REAL /* FDR-corrected p-value for Fisher's statistic for up regulated genes */,
  "fisher_stat_down" REAL /* Fisher's statistic for down regulated genes */,
  "fisher_pval_down" REAL /* P-value for Fisher's statistic for down regulated genes */,
  "fisher_fdr_down" REAL /* FDR-corrected p-value for Fisher's statistic for down regulated genes */,
  "total_samples" INTEGER /* The total number of samples used in the study */,
  "fisher_stat_confidence_interval_up" TEXT /* The confidence interval for the Fisher's statistic for up-regulated genes */,
  "fisher_stat_confidence_interval_down" TEXT /* The confidence interval for the Fisher's statistic for down-regulated genes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* The date the user joined the system */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* The date of the user's last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* The specific permissions granted to the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* The department or team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the database */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the database was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the user accessed the database */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string (e.g., browser and operating system) */,
  "accessed_table" TEXT /* The table or data set accessed */,
  "accessed_data" TEXT /* The specific data or records accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
